eras.caption: Flourishing commercial hub along the Grand Canal.

info.title: Tang Prosperity — A City of Silk
info.body: Suzhou became renowned for silk weaving. Chang Gate stood at the busiest waterfront.

info.title: Song Expansion — The Double Tower
info.body: Major reconstruction added the distinctive double gatehouse.

info.title: Ming Fortification — Walls of Stone
info.body: Reinforced with granite, watchtowers and barracks added.

eras.caption: Early photographs show the gate battered but standing.

info.title: Qing Decline — Cameras Arrive
info.body: After the Taiping Rebellion, partially restored.

eras.caption: Modernisation changed the banks, gate preserved.

info.title: Republican Suzhou — Old Meets New
info.body: Much of the city wall was removed, but Chang Gate remained.

info.title: Heritage Today — 阊门 Restored
info.body: Restored in 1990s-2000s, part of Shantang Street quarter.
